title: Azure Monitor Log Query
description: Represents a query request and response for the Azure Monitor Logs API and Application Insights query API, using Kusto Query Language (KQL).

query.description: The Analytics query in Kusto Query Language (KQL) format.

timespan.description: The timespan over which to query data in ISO 8601 duration format (e.g., PT1H, P1D, P1DT12H).

workspaces.description: A list of workspace IDs to include in cross-workspace queries.

applications.description: A list of Application Insights app IDs for cross-application queries.

tables.description: The list of tables, columns, and rows.

columns.description: The list of columns in this table.

rows.description: The resulting rows from this query. Each row is an array of values corresponding to the columns.

type.description: The data type of this column.
